member.summary: Represents a paginated list of items.
member.typeparam: The type of items in the list.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The items in the current page.
The number of items per page.

member.summary: Represents a paginated list of items.
member.typeparam: The type of items in the list.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The items in the current page.
The number of items per page.

member.summary: Gets or sets the items in the current page.

member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of items.

member.summary: Gets the current page number.

member.summary: Gets the number of items per page.

member.summary: Gets the total number of pages.

member.name: T:DbLocator.DbLocator
member.summary: DbLocator class is the main class that is used to interact with the DbLocator database.

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Constructor for DbLocator class

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Constructor for DbLocator class for Unit Testing, without Auth0 configuration

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddTenant(System.String,System.String,DbLocator.Domain.Status)
member.summary: Add Tenant to DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.GetTenants(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets Tenants from DbLocator database with search text and pagination

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.UpdateTenant(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,DbLocator.Domain.Status)
member.summary: Update Tenant information in DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.DeleteTenant(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete Tenant from DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddTenantUser(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Add user to a Tenant in DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.DeleteTenantUser(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Remove user from a Tenant in DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.GetConnection(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create SQL connection based on user, Tenant and database type

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddConnection(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Add connection to DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.DeleteConnection(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete connection from DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddDatabase(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Byte,DbLocator.Domain.Status,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Add new database on specified server and insert record in DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.GetDatabases(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get databases from DbLocator database with search text and pagination

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.UpdateDatabase(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Byte,DbLocator.Domain.Status)
member.summary: Update database information in DbLocator database and make updates on database server

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.DeleteDatabase(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete database information from DbLocator database and on server it lives on

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddDatabaseServer(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add database server to DbLocator database.
member.param: IP address of the database server
member.remarks: This method will not create a new database server. It will only add a record in the DbLocator database.

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.GetDatabaseServers
member.summary: Get database servers from DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.UpdateDatabaseServer(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Update database server information in DbLocator database
member.param: IP address of the database server

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.DeleteDatabaseServer(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete database server information from DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddDatabaseType(System.String)
member.summary: Add database type to DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.GetDatabaseTypes
member.summary: Get database types from DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.UpdateDatabaseType(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Update database type information in DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.DeleteDatabaseType(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete database type from DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddPermission(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add permission to DbLocator database and to Auth0 API

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.GetPermissions
member.summary: Get permission information in DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.UpdatePermission(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Update permission information in DbLocator database and to Auth0 API

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.DeletePermission(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete permission in DbLocator database and Auth0 API

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddRolePermission(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Add permission to a role in DbLocator database and Auth0 API

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.DeleteRolePermission(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete permission from a role in DbLocator database and Auth0 API

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddRole(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add role to DbLocator database and Auth0 tenant

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.GetRoles
member.summary: Get roles from DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.UpdateRole(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Update role information in DbLocator database and Auth0 tenant

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.DeleteRole(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete role from DbLocator database and Auth0 tenant

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddUserRole(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Add user to a role in DbLocator database and Auth0 tenant

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.DeleteUserRole(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Remove user from a role in DbLocator database and Auth0 tenant

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddUser(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,DbLocator.Domain.Status)
member.summary: Add user to DbLocator database and Auth0 tenant

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.GeneratePasswordChangeTicket(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generate Url for user to go update their password in Auth0
member.param: Url to redirect user to after password change

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.GetUsers(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get users from DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.UpdateUser(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,DbLocator.Domain.Status)
member.summary: Update user information in DbLocator database and Auth0 tenant

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.UpdateUserPassword(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Update user password in Auth0

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.DeleteUser(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete user from DbLocator database and Auth0 tenant

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.GetAuth0Id(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Get a user's Auth0Id from an authenticated http request
